title: Creative Videographer & Editor
description:
About MIJ Hub Ltd

MIJ Hub is a leading Singapore-based non-profit with over 14 years of impact, empowering neurodivergent individuals through education, therapy, and employment pathways from early years to adulthood across three centres in Singapore and one in Malaysia.

Driven by innovation and sustainability, MIJ Hub pioneers new models of inclusive growth through its social enterprises: Komunal, a speciality cafe employing persons with special needs, and Ashraff’s Cafe, a back-kitchen e-commerce bakery and lifestyle gifting brand.

About the role

We are looking for a creative and hands-on Videographer / Video Content Producer to support our marketing and branding initiatives. This role is responsible for producing high-quality video content—from concept to final edit—that strengthens brand awareness, drives engagement, and supports marketing campaigns across digital platforms.

You will work closely with the marketing and content teams, manage the full video production lifecycle, and bring stories to life through compelling visuals and storytelling.

Key Responsibilities

● Video Production & Content Creation

● Plan, produce, film, and edit high-quality videos, including promotional videos, social media content, tutorials, testimonials, and event coverage

● Operate cameras, gimbals, lighting, and audio equipment to capture visually engaging footage

● Apply cinematography techniques to enhance visual storytelling and production quality

● Manage pre-production, production, and post-production processes independently to ensure timely delivery

Creative & Collaboration

● Collaborate with the marketing team and stakeholders to develop creative concepts aligned with brand and campaign goals

● Apply storyboarding and shot-planning skills to visualise video sequences and narrative flow

● Ensure video content aligns with target audience needs and brand guidelines

Marketing & Performance

● Support marketing strategies through video content that enhances brand awareness and engagement

● Monitor and analyse video performance across platforms, providing insights and recommendations for improvement

● Stay updated on industry trends, tools, and best practices in video production and video marketing

Operational & Support

● Travel to various locations for video shoots and adapt to different environments and project requirements

● Support live-streaming, studio production, and on-site filming activities
Assist with other marketing tasks such as social media content creation, content planning, and event support

● Perform ad-hoc duties related to video production and content creation as assigned

Requirements

● Proven experience as a Videographer, Video Editor, or similar role

● Strong proficiency in video filming and editing software (e.g. Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

● Hands-on experience with cameras, stabilisers/gimbals, lighting, and audio equipment

● Strong storytelling, visual composition, and editing skills

● Ability to manage multiple projects independently and meet deadlines

● Willingness to travel for shoots and work flexible hours when required (events, live shoots)

Nice to Have

● Experience with social media video formats (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

● Knowledge of live-streaming tools and studio setups

● Basic understanding of digital marketing and content performance analytics

Why Join Us

● Opportunity to work on meaningful, creative projects across multiple platforms

● Exposure to diverse shoots, campaigns, and storytelling formats

● Collaborative and dynamic team environment

● Travel opportunities included for our Malaysia brand

postedCompany.description:
About MIJ Hub Ltd

My Inspiring Journey Hub (MIJ Hub) is a leading and rapidly growing private school and non-governmental organization (NGO) dedicated to transforming the lives of individuals aged 4 to 40 with diverse learning needs. Through our comprehensive educational programs, vocational training, and community integration initiatives, we have been creating positive change locally for over 13 years. Our mission is to be the ultimate one-stop center for the special needs community in the region.


At MIJ Hub, we are pioneers in innovation. By managing multiple for-profit ventures, including a food and beverage (F&B) arm, we generate sustainable income streams that allow us to provide subsidies, ensuring parents and students have access to affordable, high-quality education. Join MIJ Hub and become part of a vibrant, dynamic team committed to driving financial sustainability, fostering inclusivity, and expanding our reach to make a real difference in the community.
postedCompany.name: MIJ HUB LTD.
